scripts.build: npm run build -w @profile/shared && npm run build -w @profile/api && npm run build -w @profile/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @profile/shared && npm run lint -w @profile/api && npm run lint -w @profile/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @profile/shared && npm run typecheck -w @profile/api && npm run typecheck -w @profile/web && npm run typecheck -w @profile/shared
scripts.test: npm run test -w @profile/shared && npm run test -w @profile/api && npm run test -w @profile/web
